package rulecoverage

func PositivePathParamParsingDuplicatedAcrossHandlers() string {
    ruleID := "path_param_parsing_duplicated_across_handlers"
    family := "architecture"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "captures the smell described by this rule"
    description := "Repeated `strconv` or UUID path-param parsing logic that should live in helpers."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
